title: Glassy Portuguese Elderflower Broth
description: A refreshing and peppery Portuguese dish featuring elderflower, this broth is a hangover cure and can be served raw or broiled. It has a unique glassy-jelly texture.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix the agar agar powder with a little water to dissolve.
In a large pot, combine the elderflower syrup, water, lemon juice, black pepper, and salt.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the dissolved agar agar mixture to the pot and stir well.
Remove the pot from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Strain the broth into a clean container and discard the solids.
Let the broth cool to room temperature, then refrigerate it until it sets.
Just before serving, garnish with fresh elderflowers and serve chilled or broiled.
If broiling, brush the top with a little water and broil for 1-2 minutes, or until slightly caramelized.
